subject: A quick win for Weninger Dentistry's front desk
body:
Hi,

I was checking out Weninger Dentistry's website and it's clear you run a well-established practice in Tampa.

One thing I noticed is that appointment requests go through a contact form. We help dental offices add online scheduling that integrates directly with your practice management software, so patients book themselves and your front desk doesn't have to play phone tag.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
